core/common_3_letter.name: Common 3-Letter Words
core/common_3_letter.description: High-frequency 3-letter English words and crossword fill

core/crosswordese.name: Classic Crosswordese
core/crosswordese.description: Words that appear frequently in crossword puzzles

core/standard.name: Standard Words
core/standard.description: Standard English words for general fill

themed/expressions_and_slang.name: Expressions & Slang
themed/expressions_and_slang.description: Modern slang, texting abbreviations, internet culture, and common expressions from NYT crosswords

themed/foreign_classics.name: Foreign Classics
themed/foreign_classics.description: Classic Spanish and French words commonly found in NYT crosswords

themed/foreign_words.name: Foreign Words
themed/foreign_words.description: Spanish and French words (5,745 words) typical in English crosswords

comprehensive.name: Comprehensive Dictionary
comprehensive.description: Complete crossword dictionary with 453,992 words from Matt Abate, Chris Jones, and custom expressions

comprehensive_scored.name: Comprehensive Dictionary (Scored)
comprehensive_scored.description: Complete crossword dictionary with scoring - 453,992 words with quality scores

custom/personal.name: Personal Theme Words
custom/personal.description: Custom themed words for personal puzzles

custom/gift_for_sarah.name: Gift for Sarah
custom/gift_for_sarah.description: Special themed words for Sarah's puzzle

external/normalized/peter_broda.name: Peter Broda Wordlist
external/normalized/peter_broda.description: Peter Broda's comprehensive crossword wordlist with 483,499 scored words. One of the most respected wordlists in crossword construction.

external/normalized/crosshatch.name: Crosshatch/Diehl Wordlist
external/normalized/crosshatch.description: Mark Diehl's trimmed version of Peter Broda's list with 250,901 scored words. Curated for quality crossword construction.

external/normalized/christophsjones.name: Chris Jones Wordlist
external/normalized/christophsjones.description: 173,320 scored words curated from NYT, WSJ, WaPo, UKACD, Peter Broda's list, and Peter Norvig's frequency counts.

external/normalized/enable.name: ENABLE Dictionary
external/normalized/enable.description: Enhanced North American Benchmark Lexicon with 172,669 words. Public domain Scrabble dictionary used by Words with Friends.

external/normalized/ospd.name: OSPD (Official Scrabble Players Dictionary)
external/normalized/ospd.description: 79,244 words from the Official Scrabble Players Dictionary. Good for Scrabble-valid crossword fill.

external/normalized/rifkin_300k.name: Rifkin 300K Dictionary
external/normalized/rifkin_300k.description: 307,337 English words aggregated from multiple sources including rosettacode.org, umich.edu, SIL.org, and mieliestronk.com.

external/normalized/common_5k.name: Common 5K Words
external/normalized/common_5k.description: 4,996 common English words from Michael Wehar's public domain word list. Good for easy crossword fill.

external/normalized/crossword_nexus.name: Crossword Nexus Collaborative Wordlist
external/normalized/crossword_nexus.description: The largest open-source crossword wordlist with 557,877 scored words. Community-maintained by Crossword Nexus with contributions from constructors worldwide.

external/normalized/spreadthewordlist.name: Spread the Word(list)
external/normalized/spreadthewordlist.description: 308,687 scored words compiled by Brooke Husic & Enrique Henestroza Anguiano. Data-driven from USA Today, Universal, Modern crosswords, Wikipedia, Jeopardy, and Scrabble words.

core.name: Core Wordlists
core.description: Essential wordlists for basic crossword construction

themed.name: Themed Collections
themed.description: Words organized by themes, topics, and cultural references

external.name: External Wordlists
external.description: Curated wordlists from open-source repositories (Peter Broda, ENABLE, OSPD, etc.)
